steps.name: Semantic Storyboard prompt + Scene Tree schema, no layout fields, parse-fail-loud (BR-1, BR-6)
Layout Classifier - versioned rule table, deterministic (BR-3, BR-7)
Resolve integration with Constraint Resolver + Theme (BR-4)
Persist semantic_tree + resolved + layout_override + motion_plan in scene_set version
Golden fixtures + property tests + full-pipeline MockLLM CI integration test
Manual acceptance - 3 real topics via Ollama (AC6, human-in-the-loop)

decisions.decision: resolve.py is a thin integration shim — does NOT redefine presets or schema. Wires classify_tree + motion_plan outputs into a strict-valid resolved_scene dict. BR-4 enforced via count-match guard.
SceneSet/SceneSetVersion models use JSONB for all Layout Engine outputs. total_duration_s stored as Text for precision; layout_override_release_reason added per BR-5 audit trail.
